title: Seiko 5 Sports SRPD Series
desc: The definitive modern entry to automatic horology. We chose the SRPD for its bulletproof NH36 movement and the legendary 4 o'clock crown. Note: It gains/loses a few seconds daily — that's mechanical charm, not a defect.

title: Invicta Pro Diver 5053
desc: Powered by Seiko's NH35a automatic calibre with a genuinely tested 200m water resistance. A classic, high-contrast coin-edge bezel dive watch that punches way above its price tag for daily wear and ultimate durability.

title: Citizen Eco-Drive Chandler
desc: The ultimate set-it-and-forget-it military field watch. Powered by any light source via Citizen's legendary Eco-Drive tech. Features a rugged tactical canvas strap and zero battery maintenance required for active life.

title: Casio G-Shock GA-2100 'CasiOak'
desc: An absolute icon in modern watch design. Features the legendary G-Shock shock resistance wrapped in a slim, octagonal carbon core guard structure. The indestructible daily beater for minimalists.

title: 14oz Heavyweight Boxy Hoodie
desc: Dropped shoulder, dense knit construction. Holds shape after repeated washes — most hoodies at this price don't.

title: Salomon Speedcross 6 Trail Shoes
desc: High-grip terrain footwear that anchors a minimalist outfit without looking purely technical.

title: Heavyweight Cotton Overshirt, Stone
desc: Structured layering piece that holds its shape — the anchor for the three-piece cool-weather formula.

title: Heavyweight Cotton Tee, Black (Boxy Fit)
desc: Matte-finish heavyweight cotton built for the all-black formula — texture does the work color usually does.

title: UGREEN Revodok Max 13-in-1 Dock
desc: True 40Gbps Thunderbolt 4 throughput. Runs dual 4K displays without the bandwidth compromises cheaper docks make.

title: Logitech Lift Vertical Mouse
desc: A genuine ergonomic improvement, not just a marketing angle — noticeable after a few full work days.

title: Sony WH-CH720N Noise Canceling Headphones
desc: Active noise cancellation that actually improves call clarity from inconsistent work environments.

title: Single-Monitor Vertical Stand
desc: Eye-level mounting that keeps a one-screen setup from feeling like a compromise.
